allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh repo edit virtualryder/healthcare_ai_agents --description \\"Governed AI agents for healthcare providers and payers — denial management, prior auth, clinical admin, patient access, UM, coding, care management, contact center. Built on AWS Bedrock + AgentCore with HIPAA controls.\\"" 2>&1)

Bash(cmd.exe /c "gh repo edit virtualryder/healthcare_ai_agents --add-topic healthcare --add-topic ai-agents --add-topic hipaa --add-topic aws-bedrock --add-topic langgraph --add-topic healthcare-ai --add-topic revenue-cycle --add-topic prior-authorization --add-topic clinical-nlp --add-topic mcp-gateway --add-topic phi-masking --add-topic governance --add-topic python" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\); Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source' 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\(''decks/HPP-01-Revenue-Cycle-Denial.pptx''\); print\([n for n in z.namelist\(\) if ''image'' in n.lower\(\) or ''media'' in n.lower\(\)]\); z.close\(\)")
